name: Cable & Hose Protector Ramp
shortDescription: Rubber cable and hose protector ramp for site walkways and vehicle crossings.
longDescription: Where cables or hoses have to cross a walkway or vehicle path, this rubber ramp channels them under a hard plastic cover, protecting both the cable and anyone stepping or driving over it. Multi-channel versions (3–5 channels) suit larger cable bundles.

images.alt: Cable & Hose Protector Ramp supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Rubber with hard plastic channel cover

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Protecting cables/hoses crossing walkways or vehicle paths
